overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking along a futuristic elevated walkway in a dense cyberpunk city. The camera follows a path past orange benches and tropical plants, approaching a parked motorcycle and an NPC near concrete stairs, with industrial overhead pipes and neon-lit buildings visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with seating and tropical landscaping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway past orange benches and tropical plants

entered.detail: futuristic orange seating with integrated lighting along the left side
tropical palm trees and spiky plants in planters
smooth grey concrete wall with horizontal lines
thick yellow industrial pipes running overhead across the walkway
tall cyberpunk skyscrapers with glass facades in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic elevated walkway lined with orange benches and tropical plants on the left, and a smooth grey wall on the right. The camera moves forward at walking speed toward yellow industrial overhead pipes, with a dense cyberpunk cityscape visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial elevated walkway with red barriers

events.description: game UI notification 'ASSAULT IN PROGRESS' appears in the lower left corner

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway toward a parked futuristic motorcycle

notable_agents.action: futuristic black motorcycle parked stationary on the walkway ahead

entered.detail: red and grey metal barriers lining the left edge of the walkway
sleek black futuristic motorcycle with red accents
grey concrete staircase with red trim on the right side
grey box-like industrial machine or generator in the center

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, the benches and plants give way to industrial red barriers. A game notification appears indicating an assault in progress. The camera approaches a parked futuristic motorcycle and a concrete staircase becomes visible on the right, while industrial structures dominate the center of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: walkway intersection with stairs and utility area

agents.ego_description: moving past the parked motorcycle and approaching a character standing near the concrete stairs

notable_agents.action: character in blue jacket standing stationary near the stairs and motorcycle

entered.detail: human figure wearing a blue jacket and dark pants
large green industrial dumpster with yellow lid

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the parked motorcycle, which is now stationary on the right, and approaches a concrete staircase. A character in a blue jacket stands near the stairs next to a green dumpster. The industrial barriers recede into the distance on the left as the camera focuses on the stairway area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic elevated walkway that transitions from a landscaped path into a gritty industrial zone. It begins by gliding past orange benches and tropical plants beside a smooth grey wall, moving forward toward yellow overhead pipes and a dense cityscape. As the camera progresses, the greenery is replaced by industrial red barriers and a game notification appears, signaling a shift in tone as a parked futuristic motorcycle and concrete stairs come into view. The scene then shifts focus past the stationary motorcycle toward the stairway area, where a character in a blue jacket stands beside a green dumpster. Finally, the industrial barriers recede into the distance as the camera settles on the figure by the stairs.
